4. Consistency: OK. Your <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are consistent with each other. You correctly rejected the trade because you have no resources to accept it, and you explained your reasoning clearly.

5. Rule compliance: OK. You are respecting the rules by rejecting the proposal on Move 1/4, as Player BLUE is allowed to do so.
</critique>
